name: Agent Assist Telco — Lambda
description: Dual-speed lambda architecture for telco call center AI. Real-time call event streaming via Eventhouse for live ops dashboards, batch transcript storage in Lakehouse for data science/ML, Warehouse gold layer for BI, and Dataverse CRM integration.

tasks.name: Real-time call stream
tasks.description: Ingest live telephony transcription events via Eventstream (call-stream-eventstream) from Event Hub.

tasks.name: CRM batch sync
tasks.description: Sync Dataverse CRM entities (contacts, cases, agents) via Pipeline (crm-sync-pipeline) using Fabric Link.

tasks.name: Speed layer store
tasks.description: Capture raw call events in near-real-time in Eventhouse (call-events-eventhouse) for sub-second query latency.

tasks.name: KQL database
tasks.description: KQL Database (call-events-kqldb) inside the Eventhouse for structured KQL queries on streaming call data.

tasks.name: Batch layer store
tasks.description: Store raw and processed call transcripts in Lakehouse (call-transcripts-lakehouse) as Delta tables for data science.

tasks.name: Spark environment
tasks.description: Shared compute environment (spark-env) with Python libraries for notebooks. Published before notebook attachment.

tasks.name: Real-time aggregation
tasks.description: KQL Queryset (call-insights-kql) computes live call metrics — queue depth, avg handle time, SLA breach alerts.

tasks.name: Batch ETL
tasks.description: Notebook (transcript-etl-notebook) transforms raw transcripts → silver (cleaned) → gold (enriched with CRM data) in Lakehouse.

tasks.name: Gold serving layer
tasks.description: Warehouse (call-analytics-warehouse) stores gold-layer dimensional model for BI — fact_calls, dim_agents, dim_customers.

tasks.name: Semantic model
tasks.description: Semantic Model (call-analytics-model) in Direct Lake mode over Warehouse for fast Power BI without import refresh.

tasks.name: Real-time dashboard
tasks.description: Real-Time Dashboard (call-ops-rt-dash) showing live call queue, agent status, SLA gauges from Eventhouse KQL queries.

tasks.name: Analytics report
tasks.description: Power BI Report (call-analytics-report) for historical call analytics — trends, agent performance, customer satisfaction.

tasks.name: ML experimentation
tasks.description: ML Experiment (transcript-ml-experiment) for training models on transcript data — sentiment, intent classification, churn.

tasks.name: ML model registry
tasks.description: ML Model (transcript-ml-model) stores the promoted model version for production scoring.

tasks.name: ML scoring
tasks.description: Notebook (ml-scoring-notebook) runs batch inference on new transcripts using the registered model, writes predictions to Lakehouse.
